reply.text: I'm suing you for emotional damage

messages.text: emotional damage is crazy talk rn
i got 3 things for you — 1. my time, 2. my energy, 3. ur number

poolside lawyer vibes, i stand on business
ur case weak, clouds backing me up
jury saw that black bikini and fainted
they folded before opening statements honestly 💀
so youre choosing me?
you got jokes, now show it
objection, it’s clearly all year for you
sustained, but keep talking nice like that😭
ill, as your emotional support menace
not emotional support villain by the pool 💀
villain arc started when you posted that angle

elaborate
because you want to
